followUpEdits.summary: DatePicker/Calendar Cell standard/default(540:4183) & standard/disabled(540:4190) circle frames: fill control/bg/default(VariableID:2:439) -> date-picker/bg/today(VariableID:6918:3); stroke base/white(VariableID:1:3) -> date-picker/bg/today(VariableID:6918:3).
followUpEdits.reason: base/white was always pure white -> showed as a white ring against dark-mode panel (gray-dark/100). date-picker/bg/today resolves light=base/white, dark=gray-dark/100, so the today-circle becomes transparent against the panel in dark mode.
followUpEdits.verifiedLightRender: Cell set 540:4167 screenshot: default & disabled circles invisible (white-on-white) as expected; no collapse/breakage.

structuralNotes.alreadyComponentSets: Both source nodes (540:4167 calendar_cell_state, 540:4209 calendar_tile) were ALREADY COMPONENT_SETs, not plain frames with loose components. So combineAsVariants was NOT needed — only rename + property rename + token rebind. Plan premise ('8/3 separate components → combine') did not match the file state.
structuralNotes.packing: Both sets were already compactly packed (cell 264x143, tile 320x96). No 10000px collapse to fix; no repacking/hug-resize needed.
structuralNotes.cyclicReferences: None — cell/tile variants do not contain instances of sibling variants. No detach needed.
structuralNotes.remapNote: Existing instances of these sets remap automatically; node ids of the sets/variants are unchanged (rename does not change ids; property rename keeps variant component ids).
structuralNotes.collectionChoice: New date-picker variables created in LOCAL 'Semantic V2 260608' (VariableCollectionId:6736:9221), aliasing LOCAL 'Foundation V2 260608' (6736:8967). NOTE: the pre-existing variant bindings pointed at the OLD library collections ('semantic' 2:370 / 'Foundation' 1:2). Rebinding to the local V2 collections migrates these components onto the canonical local token set.

variablesCreated.tokensNote: Plan listed only 6 NEW tokens, but the swap mapping referenced 8 more date-picker tokens (bg/today, bg/selected, border/today, text/secondary, text/today, text/selected, text/disabled, text/primary) that the plan ASSUMED already existed in Figma. They did NOT exist (no date-picker vars existed in the file). All 14 were therefore created from vars-data.ts values (lines 548-567).

DatePicker/Calendar Cell.name: DatePicker/Calendar Cell
DatePicker/Calendar Cell.rangeEndpointMapping: range/start mirrors standard 'today' (white circle bg/today, border/today, text/today); range/end mirrors standard 'selected' (filled bg/selected, border/today, white text/selected). This implements plan's 'range/* text 동일 패턴' instruction by reusing the same date-picker semantics as standard.
